name: hypo-workflow
description: Serialized prompt workflow for planning, execution, auditing, debugging, and release with /hw:* commands.

interface.shortDescription: Plan-to-release workflow automation for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Hypo-Workflow packages the core workflow engine and /hw lifecycle commands so agents can initialize, plan, execute, audit, debug, and release work from a local .pipeline workspace.
